title: The Palace Crisis Deepens
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Vander Decken, Luffy, Zoro. The core story beat is the palace crisis deepens.
scene: The scene centers on the palace crisis deepens, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Vander Decken, Luffy, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have always longed to visit the ocean forest in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For all these ten long years...!! But everyone always warns me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that it is far too dangerous for me to leave the tower and of course the thought scares me terribly...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Luffy-Sama... Will you really... Take me out of this place?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...you truly promise to protect me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah. Leave it to me. It'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember, therefore

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UWAAH HHH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa, Whoa!! If you start crying, I might change my mind!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Besides, it's you who's gonna be taking me out, really!! I can't swim, you know!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I... I am sorry... I was just so happy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You really are a big crybaby, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and a scaredy- Cat, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Still, you're so big, if you leave the tower everyone will notice right away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...indeed... I am sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't worry! I've got a ReAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shishishi Shish!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Mermaid Princess!! Are you all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: S - Skeleton!! Take a look at the tower walls!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...this is... outrageous...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was not the usual knives or axis flying at the tower after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that was the sound of human pirates crashing into the tower walls!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: What kind of monster could do this...?!!! Vander Decken, you fiend...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm, there

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: EHA?! V... Vander Becken?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is not good at all... could it be that this imperntrable palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Has been invaded by enemy forces?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: This is... some kind of Ambush...?! an attack...?!! the king is in danger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The Princess is in Dan- Geeeer!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Those nasty sounds have stopped now, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go, scaredy- cat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Y... yes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am counting on you, Megalo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Full Speed Ahead, Sha- AAAARK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to the ocean forest!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...?!! Megalo Ooooo?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahh...?!!...Luffy- San?!!

summary: The Palace Crisis Deepens. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
